item.heartless.heart_ripper.desc: Rips out the hearts of weakened foes
item.heartless.queen_heart.desc: Doubles the length of all potion effects, both positive and negative, that you are afflicted with
item.heartless.momentum_heart.desc: Moving and dealing damage grants levels of Inertia, which increases your move speed, mining speed, and attack speed. Not moving or dealing enough damage causes you to lose levels of Inertia
item.heartless.void_heart.desc: Voids any projectiles that touch you, but your hunger drains quickly
advancements.heartless.root.title: Heartless
advancements.heartless.equip_heart.title: Transplant
advancements.heartless.heart_attack.titl: I Do My Crosswords In Pen
advancements.heartless.heart_attack.desc: Become heartless (and die as a result)
advancements.heartless.heart_ripper.desc: Craft a Heart Ripper, used to separate a heart from its owner
advancements.heartless.class_heart.title: Choose your class
advancements.heartless.class_heart.descr: Use a Heart Ripper to remove a heart from its bearer
advancements.heartless.queen_heart.title: Queen of Queens
advancements.heartless.queen_heart.descr: Grow the Heart of the Queen
advancements.heartless.void_heart.title: Void Given Form
advancements.heartless.void_heart.descri: Grow the Heart of the Void
